title: Government Internal Audit Agency Corporate Plan 2025-26
body: "We are the Government Internal Audit Agency (GIAA), an executive agency of His Majesty’s Treasury. We were set up in April 2015 to improve the quality of internal audit provided to central government.  Our corporate plan is published annually and explains the priority actions that we need to make over the next twelve months to meet our ambitions set out in our Agency Strategy 2023-26. "
